case_title: SALEEM MALIK VS. GINO RINALDI et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RINALDI, GINO
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RINALDI, GINO
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-02-2003. MAY-07-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR HENRY HOWARD SHAIN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-02-2003 THROUGH AUG-31-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-07-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR HENRY SHAIN

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALIK, SALEEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RINALDI, GINO $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,750.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET ON NOV-14-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED. OCT-07-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, ACKNOWLEDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RINALDI, GINO AS TO PLAINTIFF MALIK, SALEEM

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALIK, SALEEM AS TO DEFENDANT RINALDI, GINO DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-28-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-27-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-13-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-25-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALIK, SALEEM
HEARING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-25-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-07-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-28-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
